tasks.actualHoursHint: Calculated from when the task entered In Progress until Done.

calendar.optimizePrompt: Optimize this week's schedule and show free slots for deep study
calendar.focusPrompt: Find free / focus time on my calendar this week
calendar.optimizeFallback: I've looked at your week. I suggest blocking 9–11 AM on Tue and Thu for deep work, and keeping Wed afternoon free for meetings. Want me to add these blocks?
calendar.focusFallback: Based on your calendar, you have focus time: Tue 9–11 AM, Thu 2–4 PM, and Sat morning. I can add a recurring 'Focus' block for these slots if you'd like.
calendar.timesRequired: Start and End times are required
calendar.createError: An error occurred while creating the event
calendar.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this event?

focusRoom.quizEmptyHint: Use the AI tools above to generate interactive study sets, flashcards, or mindmaps!

ai.sendError: Sorry, there was an error sending the message. Please try again.
